gates.name: Data freshness
gates.message: Replay timestamp and source envelopes are present.

gates.name: Source count
gates.message: 13 distinct source labels in ledger rows.

gates.name: Minimum confidence
gates.message: Public context uses confidence and limitation labels.

gates.name: Uncertainty ceiling
gates.message: Finance and UBO remain context-only until official documents are attached.

gates.name: Data completeness
gates.message: Enough for demo/pre-DD triage, not enough for production reliance.

gates.name: KvK verification
gates.message: KvK identifier is configured, but current extract is not attached as a source-hashed document.

gates.name: Financial data
gates.message: Finance route found, but no target-specific official filing/P&L population attached.

gates.name: Multi-model synthesis
gates.message: Manifest records guarded local synthesis; AI is advisory, not primary proof.

gates.name: Error hygiene
gates.message: Raw provider diagnostics stay out of public HTML.

gates.name: Code integrity
gates.message: Rendered output keeps source-envelope and official-claim gates.

gates.name: Live grounding
gates.message: Findings are tied to source-bound ledger rows or marked as route/context.

gates.name: Template integrity
gates.message: Public report separates findings, evidence level and official upgrade path.

public_language_rule: State what DueSight found, label proof strength, and route hard claims to official-proof upgrade.
